{{Quote|Then the Sora I remember on Bakura was a lie.|[[Tholme/Legends|Tholme]], to [[Sora Bulq/Legends|Sora Bulq]]|<ref name="Republic 73" />}}
A '''mission to Saleucami''' occurred when [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Tholme/Legends|Tholme]] arrived on [[Saleucami/Legends|Saleucami]], and located Master [[Zao]] whom he attempted to convince to join him in his mission. However, Zao stated that he served [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and not the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]], whose principles diverged. Tholme asked Zao about [[Sora Bulq/Legends|Sora Bulq]]. Zao replied that he had sensed Bulq in the [[Magma Caverns]]. Zao then left.

==The mission==
[[File:TholmeBulq.jpg|thumb|left|250px|[[Tholme/Legends|Tholme]] duels with [[Sora Bulq/Legends|Sora Bulq]].]]
After confronting Zao, Tholme went to the Magma Caverns where he found the [[Saleucami Cloning Complex|Cloning Complex]] of [[Morgukai]] assassins. He destroyed part of the installation.

Later, he overheard a conversation between Bulq and [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], via holocomm. Also present were [[Rath Kelkko]], [[Bok]] and a hologram of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]]. After listening to this conversation, Tholme made contact with [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] and ordered Republic troops to come to Saleucami immediately. Two Morgukai [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] attacked Tholme, but were quickly defeated. Sora Bulq then appeared and attacked his old friend. While fighting, Tholme realized that there was no need to defeat the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]]: he needed only to escape and destroy the cloning installation. After this he remained in hiding until the [[Siege of Saleucami/Legends|Siege of Saleucami]].

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 73|''Republic'' 73]] {{1st}}
